reviews.review_description:
Video gameplay & review here (remove the space before the 'be' in the URL):

https://youtu. be/QXMxYDL6o2w?si=yZH8pgtCiu3QYvn1

I thought the art style was cool, reminded me of 90s shooters like Quake etc, the enemy designs are unique too, no reused assets like you often see! Decent game.
